checks: resolve the named root and authority from the signed work_binding_v1
require signed and relational root_permit_id, authority_id, and authority hashes to agree
require the exact child action, resource, currency, recipient, purpose, use, and value to fit work-payment-authority.v1
require the child request digest to match the independently verified child Permit binding
non_claims: does not establish that the child was dispatched
does not establish provider acceptance or settlement

verdicts.supported: the exact child request is contained by the named signed Work authority
verdicts.disproved: a signed/relational binding conflicts or the exact child exceeds authority
verdicts.insufficient_evidence: the child, root, authority, or exact request evidence is absent
verdicts.unverifiable_scope: the authority comparator or binding version is unsupported
